video_summary.topic: Automating TradingView strategy alerts via AlphaInsider platform
video_summary.summary: A short walkthrough demonstrating how to connect a TradingView backtest to AlphaInsider.com and then to an Alpaca brokerage account for automated trade execution. The video promotes AlphaInsider as a platform where users can upload, share, and auto-trade strategies. It ends with a call to action to watch a full tutorial video.

overall_reason: this is primarily a promotional video (course / signals / community / prop firm) — there's no checkable market claim to validate
